---
title: "Advancing Structural Stigma Research"
---

:::callout-warning
This project is currently in development. Contents and functions from the stigmaRverse are subject to change. 
:::

Thank you for visiting the stigmaRverse website. This weabsite serves as the central hub for three branches of the stigmaR universe (stigmaRverse):

1.  stigmaRdata (Data cleaning pipeline)
2.  stigmaR (R Package)
3.  stigmaR.app (Shiny App)

:::callout-note
Do you have questions about stigmaRverse? You can direct questions to our discussion board [here]().
:::

## First Time Researching Structural Stigma?
Our latest paper published in Sexuality Research and Social Policy provides an applied tutorial on conducting structural stigma research using `stigmaR`. 

You can also view a tutorial on this website under the "Examples" tab on the top of this website.
